name: nocturne-backend
description: Node.js backend for Nocturne — search/stream/download via yt-dlp.
author: mudassir131-dev

scripts.postinstall: node -e "const fs = require('fs'); if (fs.existsSync('./utils/setup.js')) { require('./utils/setup.js'); } else { console.log('No setup.js found, skipping postinstall.'); }"
